description_long: This object consists of a neatly stacked bundle of cigarettes, each cylindrical in shape with a white paper body and a brown filter tip. The cigarettes are arranged in a rectangular formation, with one cigarette placed on top, slightly separated from the rest. The brown filter tips are uniform and clearly distinguishable from the white paper wrapping. The ends of the cigarettes are flat and unburned, with no visible branding or markings. The overall appearance is clean and unused, with no signs of ash, burn marks, or packaging material present.
description: A bundle of unused, white-paper cigarettes with brown filter tips, neatly stacked together. One cigarette is placed on top, separated from the rest.
description_view_0: A perspective view showing the cylindrical cigarettes stacked in a bundle, with one cigarette resting diagonally on top.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the uniform alignment of the cigarettes and the distinct brown filters at one end.
description_view_2: A rear view showing the white ends of the cigarettes and the arrangement of the bundle, with one cigarette extending outward.
description_view_3: A top-down view focusing on the brown filter tips and the single cigarette placed on top of the bundle.
